{{action == 'add' ? util.appTranslate('add_payout_method') : util.appTranslate('update_payout_method')}}

@if (action == 'add') {
{{util.appTranslate('payout_method')}} @for (item of methods; track $index) { {{item.displayName}} }
}

@for (item of inputElements; track $index; let i = $index) {
@if (item.fieldType == 'text') { {{item.fieldName}} @if (haveSubmitClicked == true && item.isRequired == true && item.value == '') {
{{item.fieldName}} {{util.appTranslate('form_required_lbl')}}
} } @if (item.fieldType == 'number') { {{item.fieldName}} @if (haveSubmitClicked == true && item.isRequired == true && item.value == '') {
{{item.fieldName}} {{util.appTranslate('form_required_lbl')}}
} } @if (item.fieldType == 'phone') {
{{util.appTranslate('country_lbl')}} @for (item of countryCodes | async; track $index) { {{item.flag +' '+ item.dial_code + ' '+ item.name }} } @if (haveSubmitClicked == true && item.isRequired == true && item.extraValue == '') {
{{util.appTranslate('form_required')}}
}
{{item.fieldName}} @if (haveSubmitClicked == true && item.isRequired == true && item.value == '') {
{{item.fieldName}} {{util.appTranslate('form_required_lbl')}}
}

{{item.fieldName}} {{util.appTranslate('form_required_lbl')}}
} } @if (item.fieldType == 'date') { {{item.fieldName}} @if (haveSubmitClicked == true && item.isRequired == true && item.value == '') {
{{item.fieldName}} {{util.appTranslate('form_required_lbl')}}
} }
